description_long: This sconce features a striking, contemporary design with three interlocking, elliptical rings suspended from a circular ceiling mount by thin, evenly spaced cables. The rings are arranged at varying angles, creating a dynamic, sculptural appearance that draws the eye. Each ring appears to house integrated lighting elements, likely LED strips, which would emit a soft, even glow when illuminated. The fixture is finished in a smooth, matte white, giving it a clean and modern aesthetic suitable for upscale urban environments. The cables are minimal and nearly invisible, enhancing the floating effect of the rings. The overall construction suggests a lightweight yet sturdy build, ideal for ceiling installation in public or residential spaces.
description: A modern, sculptural sconce with three interlocking elliptical rings suspended by cables from a circular ceiling mount, finished in matte white. The rings likely contain integrated LED lighting for a soft, ambient glow.
description_view_0: From this angle, the overlapping arrangement of the three elliptical rings is clearly visible, with the central ring appearing most prominent.
description_view_1: This view highlights the offset and varying tilt of the rings, emphasizing the dynamic, asymmetrical design.
description_view_2: Here, the largest ring's open interior is most visible, and the layered depth of the fixture is accentuated.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the rings' alignment from a slightly different angle, with the cables and ceiling mount clearly visible above.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and geometric, interlocking rings. Its sculptural form and matte white finish give it a contemporary, artistic appeal.
